title: Why My 90% Win Rate Made Me Broke
description: I had an incredible win rate but was still losing money. Here's the harsh truth about win rates in ICT trading that changed everything for me.
script: I had a 90% win rate. Felt unstoppable. Thought I cracked the code. But my account kept shrinking. Small wins, massive losses. I was broke. Then I learned about risk reward. Position sizing. Proper money management. Now 60% win rate. But profitable every month. Win rate is meaningless.
copyText:
Why My 90% Win Rate Made Me Broke

I had an incredible win rate but was still losing money. Here's the harsh truth about win rates in ICT trading that changed everything for me.

#ICTTrading #TradingPsychology #ForexTrading #RiskManagement #TradingTips SmartMoney #TradingMindset #R2FTrading
